question: The line chart shows sales from 1924 to 2024. What is the main difficulty in interpreting this chart?

options.A: The chart is too small to clearly see detailed changes in sales over specific years.
options.B: Sales remained exactly constant from 1924 to 2024.
options.C: The chart shows that sales declined sharply in every decade.
options.D: Sales values for each year can be read precisely from the chart.

explanation: The data shows a decline from 1960 to 1970, then a rise. Small text size can make it difficult to identify which decade had the decline.
